sol.rationale: The design uses a preselected source-disjoint pixel cohort, reciprocal evidence-grounded gold review, fail-closed transport and validation, a bounded paired structural canary, no same-page tuning, no production or official-credit path, and explicit spending ceilings.

fable.rationale: Freshness is honest: the cohort was frozen before any model output, exact source-identity exclusion covers S203-S217 and official gold, and three candidate PDFs were rejected for gold-provenance overlap, leaving two wholly unseen identities and six non-overlapping pages. Gold is pixel-grounded and dual-authored with reciprocal cross-review and independently reviewed evidence-unit mapping, so no hand-authored or contaminated gold enters. Transport fails closed: one call per item, strict schemas, append-only receipts and pre-call checkpoints, zero retries, no repair or merge, and a hard 18-call cap; any gate failure closes the mechanism without same-page tuning. The A/B is a genuine clause-bound causal test holding question, evidence, and writer family constant, with two replicates, a validator that rejects out-of-bound IDs, an assembly step that cannot silently drop accepted blocks, and an external gate requiring stable gains on 2 of 3 items, zero supported-fact regressions, zero invalid IDs/citations/claims, and dual semantic PASS; the local matcher can only open review, never grant credit, so no unsupported-credit path exists. Overfitting is avoided by fresh pages and explicit closure of failed mechanisms without retuning. The target stays closed: even a full external PASS authorizes only a pre-registered bounded probe and never touches production defaults, the canonical 143/157 score, or official credit; chunks_v3 wholesale remains NO-GO and Railway is not a gate. Budget is bounded at USD 150 internal stop under the USD 200 ceiling. No false-GO, contamination, unsupported-credit, transport, or budget blocker is present.
